name: pandastack
description: Personal AI operator OS for Claude Code. Skill-only (no agents, no commands), ~50 skills with 3-layer surface (12 user-typed verbs + description-match + lib/ shared modules), 7 lifecycle flows, 5 scenario flow commands (sprint / office-hours / boardroom / dojo / retro), 5 persona skills (ceo + 4 -lead). Covers dev / knowledge / writing / work / research / retro / decision lifecycles.
